title: Frau Holle
writer: Jacob Grimm, Wilhelm Grimm, Günter Kaltofen
actors: Mathilde Danegger, Karin Ugowski, Katharina Lind
plot: Once upon a time there was a widow who had two daughters: one was her own, the other was a stepdaughter. The eldest relative was ugly and lazy, and the youngest was beautiful and hardworking.
